note: As-built UML set (report ⑤) for v0.5.0. No before/ set — plan ① drew no as-is baseline.

diagrams.title: As-built sketch pipeline: --style axis → src/rough + Kalam font → svg / native / runtime (parity) → SVG/PNG/HTML
As-built structure: src/rough source of truth mirrored into vnmRuntime + reused by the native sketch-svg helper; sketch-font embedded
A --style sketch render call: renderer → seeded rough gen + embedded font → hand-drawn output (PNG via resvg, HTML via the inlined runtime)
